Title: DB.DBA.ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_DEL
Description:
The returned value is APS_ID of a deleted phrase set if positive or an error code if negative. A phrase
set can not be deleted while used by some advertiser (as described here ).
Examples:
SQL>select ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_ADD ('simple test', null, null, null, '123', '', 'dba', 'dba');
callret
INTEGER
1
1 Rows. -- 0 msec.
SQL>select ANN_PHRASE_CLASS_DEL ('simple test', 'dba', 'dba');
callret
VARCHAR
1
1 Rows. -- 70 msec.
